actionUnits.condition: Object has BoxCollider (enabled) and no Rigidbody; Trigger is allowed. Attached MonoBehaviour (script GUID 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) matches Fire class with fields: debug, isOn, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, maxNeighborDistance=4, downMultiplier=2, maxHitInterval=2, totalHitTime=5, onNeighborsThreshold=2, minNeighborDownDistance=3, mainEffectGo -> ParticleSystem. There are no public no-arg methods on Fire to invoke via Trigger; behavior changes occur automatically via Update when onNeighbors >= onNeighborsThreshold and over time, or when WaterHit(Vector3) is called externally by a water system. Please provide neighbor Fire instances or a water emitter to drive WaterHit; otherwise this Trigger only exercises collider interaction and waits for any automatic state changes.
